chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1149 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 12.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Wahab Chohan, Advocate for the applicant a/w the applicant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. None present for the complainant. ------------------------------- Counsel for the applicant/accused has submitted a statement dated 12.08.2025 for withdrawal of the bail application on account of the order passed on 06.08.2025 by the Judicial Magistrate-X Malir Karachi in SCMO No.105 of 2025 wherein by way of a compromise compounding the offence the accused was acquitted under Section 345 Cr.P.C. The affidavits duly sworn by the Court and the NADRA Verification are available on record. Learned APG has perused the file and raised no further comments. In the light of the same, this bail application is dismissed as withdrawn in the above terms. J U D G E Asif
